raw_consumer_statement:
I purchased some goods online on XX/XX/XXXX with order number XXXX for a total of $ XXXX.After reviewing the orders upon delivery I kept some and used the Macy 's website to initiate a return that was dropped off at a XXXX  fulfillment center on XX/XX/XXXX. Return label details include 1. Estimated Refund - {$3600.00} XXXX Tracking # XXXX XXXX. Order # XXXX 4. Reservation # : XXXX On XX/XX/XXXX at XXXX XXXX, I got an email stating the package was delivered and my refund will be processed within 3-5 days. I waited a week, called the customer service line, and was told due to the amount it would take 28 business days to get credited. After a month I called again and then I was told they never got the package. After a few calls again I was then told that they got the package but there was nothing in it. I went to XXXX  site to file a claim however, the system will not let me stating ONLY THE RECIEVER CAN FILL A MISSING PACKAGE CLAIM. 

I tracked the package on the UPS site and under proof of Delivery it shows the package was delivered at the Macy 's XXXX at XXXX Arizona on XX/XX/XXXX at XXXX XXXX, It showed the weight of the box at " XXXX '' and " MACYs XXXX '' received it. I honestly don't understand how a XXXX box is " Empty '' after delivery. No one at Macy 's has been helpful or shown concern about my money. 

I called the Macy 's store card and filed a claim to no avail as the card stated they were siding with the store. 

Please note : Because all the goods could not fit into the box, 3 of the initial items were returned to the store ( Macy 's XXXX ) in person. A total of {$310.00} was refunded. Total pending credit is XXXX - XXXX = {$3300.00}
